title: The Twins are Three People?
overview: After Kamishiro Maiku recognizes a house on television that appears in a photo that was left to him by his parents, he decides to go live there. Then two girls show up on his door step to move in, claiming to his twins.

title: We may be blood relatives
overview: Maiku has the same unusual blue eyes and the same childhood photograph as the girl at his door. They might be related.

title: We may be strangers
overview: Maiku has strong feelings about not abandoning a relative, so Miina can stay until they know otherwise.

title: Be nice to you
overview: Miina drags Karen along to a job interview so they can help with bills.

title: Do you like girls
overview: Karen and Miina begin attending Maiku's school and discover rumors that Maiku doesn't like girls circulate.

title: Love Alliance
overview: Maiku worries as the girls attempt to avoid him so they don't have to discuss their changing feelings.

title: Making memories
overview: After winning the grand prize in a lottery, Maiku, Miina and Karen head to the beach.

title: Love should be honest
overview: Maiku learns the truth of Shimazaki's sexuality. Shimazaki reunites with Tsubaki, whom he was previously in love with.

title: Don't Get in Our Way
overview: On a beautiful day, the three head to the mall, but end up getting lost from each other.

title: We'd like to run again
overview: Maiku and Karen learn of Miina's past. Karen then find out that the picture of Maiku and one of the girls was taken at a different angle.

title: We want to tell you we like you
overview: Karen goes on a date with Maiku before telling the others that they're siblings.

title: Three People Twins
overview: Miina runs away, twice. But Maiku won't let her go so easily.

title: The Summer Never Ends (OVA)
overview: Two weeks after resolving their dilemma, Karen is obsessed with her newfound brother. Miina also craves attention. Maiku tries to get his work done on a camping trip.
